text_original: The highest excellence is like (that of) water.
text_normalized: The highest excellence is like (that of) water.

text_original: The excellence of water appears in its benefiting all things, and in its occupying, without striving (to the contrary), the low place which all men dislike.
text_normalized: The excellence of water appears in its benefiting all things, and in its occupying, without striving (to the contrary), the low place which all men dislike.

text_original: Hence (its way) is near to (that of) the Dao.
text_normalized: Hence (its way) is near to (that of) the Dao.

text_original: The excellence of a residence is in (the suitability of) the place;
text_normalized: The excellence of a residence is in (the suitability of) the place;

text_original: that of the mind is in abysmal stillness;
text_normalized: that of the mind is in abysmal stillness;

text_original: that of associations is in their being with the virtuous;
text_normalized: that of associations is in their being with the virtuous;

text_original: that of words is in their trustworthiness;
text_normalized: that of words is in their trustworthiness;

text_original: that of government is in its securing good order;
text_normalized: that of government is in its securing good order;

text_original: that of (the conduct of) affairs is in its ability;
text_normalized: that of (the conduct of) affairs is in its ability;

text_original: and that of (the initiation of) any movement is in its timeliness.
text_normalized: and that of (the initiation of) any movement is in its timeliness.

text_original: And when (one with the highest excellence) does not wrangle (about his low position), no one finds fault with him.
text_normalized: And when (one with the highest excellence) does not wrangle (about his low position), no one finds fault with him.
